results.title: Israel captures strategic castle in Lebanon in deepest incursion into country in 26 yrs
results.description: Israeli troops previously captured the castle in 1982 and held it until they withdrew from Lebanon in 2000.

results.title: IPS officer Ananya Awasthi appointed first woman ADC to Odisha Governor
results.description: Bhubaneswar, May 31 (SocialNews.XYZ) Odisha Governor Dr Hari Babu Kambhampati has appointed IPS officer Ananya Awasthi as the Aide-de-Camp (ADC) to the Governor, making her the first woman officer to serve in the prestigious position.... The post IPS officer Ananya Awasthi appointed first woman ADC to Odisha Governor appeared first on Social News XYZ .
